title: Sealapack SAP1041 READY TO USE FRESHER 4 LONGER BREAD BAGS, PACK OF 8, Clear, 24.5 cm*14.0 cm*2.0 cm
features: FRESHER 4 LONGER: Sealapack Bread storage bags have been specially developed to extend the life of your favourite bread products

SAVE YOUR FAVOURITE: Which is your favourite ? Large retail pack sizes can be saved, use immediately then save a bread roll, croissant, muffin, bun, bap, barm cake, cob , pitta, slices of bread or a hot cross bun.

REDUCE WASTE: Managing bulk retail packs can be an everyday challenge, use the bread bags to save bread rolls, croissants, muffins, buns, baps, barm cakes, cobs , pittas, slices of bread or a hot cross buns to enjoy when you want to eat them
SHOP OFFERS: Shopping in store or on-line offers opportunities to try new bread products, storage bags allow you to try and save.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: PACK OF 8 BREAD SAVING BAGS
